analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE: TCGA MPNST validation cohort (n=5) not bundled in local data directory
step_by_step_analysis: The question asks for the NOTCH1 mutation frequency from Supplementary Figure 3c TCGA MPNST validation oncoprint. Per provided data context, the TCGA MPNST validation cohort (n=5) is not bundled in the local data directory, so the source data required to compute the NOTCH1 mutation frequency shown in Supplementary Figure 3c is unavailable.
